text: Between 02:11:45 and 02:12:03, host srv-auth01 experienced a rapid SSH brute-force attack from IP 91.240.118.77, 45.83.64.12, 103.145.13.9, with 6 failed login attempts targeting usernames including "root", "test", "admin", "backup", "oracle". The attacker cycled through credentials at short intervals, consistent with automated tooling such as Hydra or Medusa (MITRE ATT&CK T1110.001 (Brute Force: Password Guessing)).
